title: Dune: Mind Killer
description: Based on the best SF book DUNE
body:
Mod Trailer: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Wm4eaLSEXBE](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Wm4eaLSEXBE)

As a fan of DUNE, I was shocked that there were no DUNE Minecraft mods available anywhere, or at least on modern versions of the game, so I stepped up and made a DUNE mod, it's not that good if you are looking for a cool adventure survival mod, but for now, it's here to be looked at and not here to be a "Good" mod in the traditional sense, but I will make improvements, so please be patient.

EXTRA: Thank you so much for all your support throughout the mods existance, you guys really made my day when I noticed that people love Dune and Minecraft at the same time, so I am happy to announce that the full release of the game has been dropped, but unfortunatly i will be stepping away from the mod for a while, I will still update the mod to newer versions and to do bugfixes but no more major update for now, i wish to make new mods, so we will see where my journy ends up too, thank you, and he is THE LISAN AL-GAIB

P.S. House Erebus is a custom fan-made house.

ADDED STUFF,

0.1.1

-Fremen Man and Women Mob/Spawn egg

-Arrakis dimension that you instantly spawn in

-Burro Bush

-Crysknife weapon

-Spice Sand Plains

0.1.2

-Stillsuit

-Burro Bark

-Full/Empty waterskins

-Solaris

-Spice Refiner

-Spice

0.1.3 (The Survival Update)

-Harkonnen Soldier and crawller/harvester

-Stillsuit and Solari are now craftable

-Spice Honey Food

-Spice Honey Collector (needs 10 spice for 1 honey item)

-WindTrap

-Guild Trader with trades

0.1.4 (The Tweaking Update)

-Shieldbelt

-bug and balance fixes

0.1.5 (The Bread Update)

-Wheat seed and dirt trades from the Guild

-Changed shieldbelt recipe

-You can now use the windtrap to fill an empty bucket

0.1.6 (The Tweakening)

-Bug fixes

-Advancements tree

0.1.7

-ADDS FARMING NOW

0.1.8

-Reduces guild navigator spawns

0.1.9 (The Rebirth)

-1.20.4 neoforge support

-Suspensor Equipment

-Suspensor Connector

-Writing Chisel

-Written Sandstone (With Coloured Versions)

-Worm Sand

-The Water of life

-Thumper Block

1.0.0 (Full Release with forge 1.20.1 version)

-Atreides, Harkonnen, Emperor/Corrino, and Spaciging Guild Emblems

-Atreides, Harkonnen, Emperor/Corrino, and Spaciging Guild Uniforms

-Spool of String

-Bronze

-Uniform Fabricator

1.0.0 (forge 1.20.1)

-House Erebus Unifrom and Emblem

-Craftable oak logs
